text: delegate codex lanes failed twice mid-build (work-account quota, then an expired restored token) but both surfaced as generic harness_error; a quota/auth-specific failure reason would have saved ~30 minutes of diagnosis

exec_command returned no captured output for successful multi-line inventory commands, forcing repeated simpler probes; preserving output or surfacing why it was dropped would avoid redundant diagnostics

Python re.sub treated backslashes in verbatim paper-cut text as replacement escapes during Markdown report generation, causing a bad-escape retry; use a function replacement whenever inserting untrusted text
Broad hook searches traverse historical JSON/session backups; provide a live-hook-only discovery helper or documented excludes to avoid noisy and potentially sensitive output.

Codex exposes environment-inheritance controls but no documented shell-command selection knob; a parent SHELL/BASH_ENV codex exec probe did not yield the required bash/GNU-tool identity. Add a supported per-harness shell command setting or diagnostic.
Homebrew Bash printf treats a leading hyphen format as an option; use printf "%s\\n" for separator strings in shared shell diagnostics.
A Bash regression probe compared ${!array[@]} inside test brackets, where separate expansion words cause a false too-many-arguments failure; use the scalar ${!array[*]} form for equality assertions.
The Wave 1 GNU awk regression fixture separated x and y across lines while testing /x(y)/; use a same-line xy fixture so the capture-array assertion tests GNU awk rather than failing the fixture.
Wave 1 completion report named the retained backup directory but omitted its internal filenames, causing a failed review-bundle copy; report the exact backup paths or a directory listing.
Audit commands that print sourced credential files can expose secret values; use names/booleans-only inspection helpers.
Scratch sed portability test assumed /bin/sed; macOS provides /usr/bin/sed.
The final diff redaction helper used a non-portable sed regex and failed; inspect structured JSONL diffs without regex masking.
Filtering JSONL additions from git diff with a broad plus-line match included the +++ header and broke jq; use a strict '^+{' filter before parsing.
ShellCheck reports pre-existing SC1091 source-following and SC2155 export-assignment warnings in agent-shell/env.sh, so scoped verification needs explicit known-warning exclusions.
zsh reserves the common test-harness variable name status, causing a shell test to fail before its assertions; a shell-safe harness example would prevent this.
A wrapper-header inspection followed the claude symlink into a Mach-O binary and dumped binary bytes; detect file type before sed/head and inspect only text wrappers.
zsh reserves status as a read-only special parameter, so portable verification snippets should use a neutral exit-code variable such as rc.
cargo test accepts one filter per invocation; use separate targeted runs or one module filter
clippy rejected a nonminimal boolean in the evidence redactor; simplify boundary predicates before the final gate
Test assertion accidentally used serde_json::to_value Result directly; use unwrap before as_object.
cargo test accepts only one positional test filter; a focused multi-test invocation fails before running tests
cargo test accepts one name filter, so multiple focused tests require separate invocations
